do: Do rule 1 — placeholder for a voice principle.
dont: Don't rule 1 — placeholder for an anti-pattern.

messaging.value_prop: Value proposition placeholder — one sentence about why this product matters to its customer.
messaging.boilerplate: Boilerplate placeholder. This is a 2-3 sentence company description that gets reused across press, partnerships, and footer-level introductions. Made deliberately long enough to test how multi-line copy renders in the layout.

homepage_hero.headline: BIG HEADLINE GOES HERE
homepage_hero.subline: Supporting line placeholder — short copy that sits under the hero headline, around 15-20 words to test the layout rhythm.

product_card.name: Product Name Placeholder
product_card.description: Product description placeholder — 10-15 words explaining what the product is and why someone might want it.

instagram_post.caption: Instagram caption placeholder. This is where short-form social copy will live — written deliberately long enough to test how multi-line captions render in the IG mockup, including a couple of #hashtag placeholders. #wittyverse #placeholder

x_post.post_text: Post text placeholder for X — 1-2 short lines designed to test how a tweet renders next to its link card preview.
x_post.card_description: Link card description placeholder — the line that appears under the title in an X link card preview, usually 100-160 characters.
